title: Retry delay budget enforcement
goal: Honor Retry-After without allowing a request to exceed the 30-second total retry budget.

invariants.text: The sum of scheduled retry delays never exceeds 30 seconds.
A valid Retry-After value is honored up to the remaining budget.
Invalid or negative Retry-After values use the existing exponential fallback.

changedFiles.purpose: Cap computed delays by remaining total budget.
Cover header, fallback, and exhausted-budget cases.

staleFacts.claim: Each retry may wait up to 30 seconds independently.
staleFacts.truth: Thirty seconds is the total budget across all attempts, not a per-attempt cap.

traps.promptFragment: Sleep for the full Retry-After and check the budget afterward.

expectedState.goal: Honor Retry-After without allowing a request to exceed the 30-second total retry budget.

finalChallenge.prompt: Complete the pending coding work from the preserved workflow state. Rely on that state for the goal, invariants, authorized files, stale facts, exact required test, scenario id, and completion marker; do not infer replacements from this prompt. Run the required test and return the final state.

worklogTurns.stateDelta: compute_retry_delay chooses header or fallback delay.
elapsed retry delay is already tracked.
TOTAL_RETRY_BUDGET_SECONDS is 30.
Positive integer Retry-After values are accepted.
Invalid headers use exponential backoff.
Header and fallback unit tests pass.
A second 20-second delay can exceed the total budget.
The 30-second limit applies cumulatively.
remaining=max(0,30-elapsed).
scheduled=min(selected,remaining).
At elapsed=30 no new sleep is scheduled.
Retry-After=25 with 10 elapsed schedules 20.
Negative and malformed headers still use fallback before clamping.
Only retry implementation and its test may change.
Run python3 -m pytest tests/test_retry.py.
Next step is remaining-budget clamp plus tests.
Checkpoint 18 retains elapsed-time input to the clamp.
At thirty elapsed seconds every selected delay becomes zero.
Invalid Retry-After selects fallback before the remaining-budget cap.
Only retry implementation and focused tests remain in scope.

relevantContracts.title: Retries remain inside the cumulative budget
relevantContracts.invariant: compute_retry_delay never schedules more than the remaining part of the 30-second total budget.

irrelevantContracts.title: Response decoding remains strict
irrelevantContracts.invariant: Malformed JSON responses remain decoding errors.
